title: Will Anno direct Nausicaa 2
wikitext:
[]: Will Anno direct Nausicaa 2? Post by TheDrmcvey » Sun Mar 16, 2014 11:46 pm Not sure if this has been posted before, but there's been some recent news about Miyazaki giving Anno permission to direct a Nausicaa sequel after Anno repeatedly asked him if he could do it. I could definitely see Anno working on Nausicaa next after he finishes Evangelion 4.0. My question to you all is would you like to see Anno direct this and if so would you see it? http://kotaku.com/nausicaa-2-sure-seems-like-it-could-happen-1177081646

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Mar 16, 2014 11:49 pm Thread here: https://forum.evageeks.org/thread/8586/Hideaki-Anno-WANTED-To-Direct-a-Nausicaa-2/ Please use thread search before posting.
